mods.name: WalkieTalkies
mods.description: Push-to-talk walkie talkies with spatialized radio audio, battery, color choices and host-sync settings.

mods.name: Empress_SharedUpgrades
mods.description: Host-only upgrade sync for R.E.P.O. One pickup powers up the whole crew in real time, with modded upgrade support and late-join catch-up on level switch.

mods.name: Empress_Spawn_Browser
mods.description: The Ultimate control suite for REPO with powerful spawn tools, tax tokens, cosmetic boxes, world control, freecam, and live scene editing.

mods.name: Empress_ShopLoaderAPI
mods.description: A developer focused API for R.E.P.O. that simplifies custom shop loading with automatic networking, RNG selection, and BepInEx config integration.

mods.name: Valuables_Uncapped
mods.description: Bypasses the level value-budget so high-value loot no longer reduces how many valuables spawn. Optional increases Valuables on maps. Host-only by default.

mods.name: Pennywise_Enemy
mods.description: Adds Pennywise the Dancing Clown as a terrifying new enemy. A red balloon will stalk you... and popping it SAVES you from his arrival.

mods.name: Enemy_Health_Bars
mods.description: Health bars above every enemy. Host not required.

mods.name: Snow_Menu
mods.description: White, beautiful snowfall on the Main Menu and Lobby.

mods.name: Weeping_Angel_Renewed
mods.description: A renewed Weeping Angel enemy for REPO that freezes when watched, hunts when unseen, and brings creepy statue chaos back to your runs.

mods.name: Truck_Door_Button
mods.description: Open and Close the Truck door! Networked truck door button with synced open/close events for all clients, local FX, and anti-spam cooldown.

mods.name: Trick_or_Treat
mods.description: Adds pumpkins randomly to all levels. Open them to get a Trick or a Treat! Have a Happy Halloween!

mods.name: Christmas_Gifts
mods.description: Press **E** to open festive presents scattered around the level. Sometimes it’s a gift… sometimes it’s a *boom*. All outcomes are host-synced so everyone sees the same surprise.

mods.name: Better_DeadHead
mods.description: Steer your Dead Head with WASD after you die. Zip around the map, poke at chaos!

mods.name: Join_Notifier
mods.description: Plays a sound when someone joins your lobby. Host-only needs.

mods.name: Empress_ThirdPerson
mods.description: A simple, toggleable third-person camera mod with zoom and configurable offsets.

mods.name: REPO_Map_Party
mods.description: No more debates! Just spin the wheel! The next map is chosen in style with a flashy landing. Works with modded maps too, so every new level joins the party automatically.

mods.name: Empress_UIEditor
mods.description: Move and resize in-game HUD elements with a simple toggleable editor. Press F8 to edit, then drag or scroll to adjust. Your layout is saved and reloaded automatically.

mods.name: Mystery_Box
mods.description: Turns the Charging Station into a Mystery Box! Drop in Enemy Valuables (Orbs) to roll for random items, upgrades, or weapons.

mods.name: Better_Rotation
mods.description: Tames item rotation so high Strength doesn’t overspin; smoother, more controllable turning.

mods.name: PortalCore_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 3 Portal Cores into the game with almost 2000 lines of dialog as valuables! 2 of them have special abilities.

mods.name: Coilhead_Enemy
mods.description: Adds a Tier 3 Lethal Company Coilhead enemy to REPO, original sounds, freeze-when-seen behavior, and custom neck bounce physics.

mods.name: BlackBox_Fixer
mods.description: This mod makes BlackBox work for the current version of REPO. Fixes the crash caused by outdated REPOLib references.

mods.name: The_Bracken
mods.description: A cute version of the Bracken for REPO with a simple creepy model, very faithful Bracken-style logic, and deadly head-dragging hunts.

mods.name: SemiBot_Train_Menu
mods.description: Replaces the REPO main menu with SemiBot on a train, while a duck peeks in the window. v0.3 Update Compatible!

mods.name: Interactive_Truck_Door
mods.description: Grab the truck door and open or close it manually.

mods.name: PropHunt
mods.description: PropHunt - Hide as valuables, hunt the fakes. Multiplayer game mode.

mods.name: Empress_BetterUpgradesFixer
mods.description: Fixes Zonk's BetterUpgrades for REPO v0.3x! Strength, Health, Stamina, Range, Extra Jump, Sprint and Tumble upgrades now have tier two and tier three variants working again.

mods.name: Empress_Achievements
mods.description: Adds 236 achievements to REPO! Has popups with sound, an F8 achievements menu, save tracking, and in-game config support.

mods.name: Empress_Twilight_Forest_Compat_Patch
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Minecraft Twilight Forest to work with the current version of REPO and adds the new Vehicle Charger to the Truck.

mods.name: StaminaToEnergy
mods.description: Convert your stamina into weapon energy by holding the activation key while carrying or equipping a weapon. Fully synced. Simple, fast, and configurable.

mods.name: FullBright
mods.description: FullBright makes your game Bright and Clean - Also gets rid of fog!

mods.name: Truck_Slot_Machine
mods.description: Adds a working slot machine to the REPO truck with synced multiplayer spins, animated reels, configurable gamble costs, shop payouts that give money, and level payouts that give player upgrades.

mods.name: Empress_FlashlightControl
mods.description: Seize control of your flashlight's brightness and toggle power. Toggle it on/off while crouching also!

mods.name: BotFriends
mods.description: Spawn a squad of bot friends that follow you around, grab nearby valuables, and haul them to the extractor like loyal little loot-goblins. Singleplayer Only. WIP.

mods.name: OIA_Valuable
mods.description: A Valuable that ascended into a rave demon. Spins to the beat, explodes with lights, and summons ghost cats when the bass hits.

mods.name: TruckRespawn
mods.description: Revives players inside the truck after a host-controlled delay.

mods.name: Enemies_Anywhere
mods.description: No more safe hallways. Enemies Anywhere makes every room fair game for first spawns. Balanced, tense, unpredictable fun - with full config support. Host-only mod.

mods.name: Monster_Archive
mods.description: Access the R.E.P.O. Archive to view detailed lore, health, damage, and visual data for every known monster.

mods.name: Echohold_Station_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix for the current version of R.E.P.O. Updates Echohold Station and Plasma Weapons, and adds the Vehicle Charger to the Truck.

mods.name: Empress_Mausoleum_Compat_Patch
mods.description: Compatibility fix that patches MelanieMelicious's outdated Mausoleum level to work on current version of REPO and adds the new Vehicle Charger to the Truck.

mods.name: BanEnforcer
mods.description: BanEnforcer hands REPO hosts a proper Steam64 ban hammer with a clean in-game panel, bans that actually stick between sessions and real enforcement.

mods.name: Empress_Hospital_Compat_Patch
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Hospital Level to work with the current version of REPO and adds the Vehicle Charger to the Truck.

mods.name: Strange_Doors
mods.description: A 5 percent chance to touch a strange door and be flipped into the upside down version of the level.

mods.name: Empress_HostSwap
mods.description: If the host leaves, the game continues! Re-rolls the same level, re-syncs physics, and keeps everyone playing. A flashy UI shows the new host as the crown passes on. All players MUST have this mod installed.

mods.name: SpectatorPLUS
mods.description: Spectator++ enhances death spectating with synced Health and Stamina tracking across players. Works in multiplayer when all players use the mod. Beta version.

mods.name: Jester_Enemy
mods.description: Adds a very rare Tier 3 Jester enemy that is inspired by The Jester from Lethal Company.

mods.name: NoRecoil_Cart_Cannon
mods.description: Removes all recoil from the Cart Cannon. Simple, stable.

mods.name: The_Elevator
mods.description: A 100-floor elevator level for REPO where every stop opens into a random good or bad event, creepy challenges, solo errands, jackpots, and cabin disasters.

mods.name: CreepyMita_Enemy
mods.description: Cursed Creepy Mita is glitching and has entered REPO.

mods.name: Trampoline
mods.description: Adds a Trampoline as an item in the shop to buy! Bounce Enemies and Players around!

mods.name: Kermits_Shop
mods.description: Kermit has set up a sketchy little shop inside your truck and he really wants your money. Press E to talk to the frog and buy items.

mods.name: Empress_ArenaLoaderAPI
mods.description: A developer focused API for R.E.P.O. that enables custom Arena loading with automatic RNG selection, networking support, and BepInEx config integration.

mods.name: Easter_Egg
mods.description: A high stakes gamble! Buy this Easter Egg and throw it for a chance at massive loot... or a massive explosion.

mods.name: Zelda_Lottery_Shop
mods.description: Replaces the standard shop with a Zelda themed Lottery Shop. Features new shelves, music, and an interactive Gerudo NPC.

mods.name: Empress_Woodland_Mansion_Compat_Patch
mods.description: A compatibility fix that patches Woodland Mansion to work on current REPOLib and REPO.

mods.name: No_Moon_Phases
mods.description: No more Moon phases.

mods.name: SlenderTubby_Enemy
mods.description: Adds a Tier 1 SlenderTubby enemy to REPO.

mods.name: TF2Minigun_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates TF2 Minigun for current REPOLib and REPO, including ammo and battery behavior fixes.

mods.name: Empress_InfiniteGrab
mods.description: Hold onto anything even if tumbled or hit!

mods.name: Smoke_Bomb
mods.description: Adds a new Smoke Bomb item into the shop to purchase. Arm it by pressing E and smash it into the ground to teleport to a random location on the map. Perfect for emergencies!

mods.name: BigNuke_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates BigNuke to work with the current version of REPO.

mods.name: Pocket_Dimension_Cart
mods.description: Turns REPO carts into pocket dimensions that store valuables, sync cart loot, and let players enter the cart to manage the stash if they choose.

mods.name: PlayerReportCard
mods.description: A Host-only mod that tracks player statistics and assigns performance grades based on survival, damage taken, and deaths.

mods.name: Bowling
mods.description: Adds a Bowling level to play solo or with friends.

mods.name: Empress_Backrooms
mods.description: A shifting Backrooms level for REPO. Take the elevator down, Extract and take the elevator out... Goodluck.

mods.name: Gooby_Enemy
mods.description: A cute but dangerous Gooby enemy for REPO that wanders passively, grabs and throws players when hurt, and can Digivolve into a deadly fusion version.

mods.name: Empress_SmartMap
mods.description: Empress SmartMap upgrades the vanilla map with client side player, monster, and valuable intel markers.

mods.name: Swordsmachine
mods.description: A Swordsmachine enemy for REPO that wanders the map, spots players with line of sight, then dashes in with a deadly sword slam.

mods.name: Empress_Shop_Price_Editor
mods.description: Allows the Host to easily edit prices for all Vanilla and Modded shop items via config.

mods.name: Valorant_Weapon_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Valorant weapons for current REPOLib and REPO, including ammo and battery behavior fixes.

mods.name: Living_Room_Main_Menu
mods.description: Replaces the default main menu with a cozy living room scene. Features chill music, animations, and a SemiBot drinking.

mods.name: Repo_Classes
mods.description: Become a superhero in REPO with host-synced superpower roles, active abilities, queued role swaps, and an in-game role picker.

mods.name: M79_Grenade_Launcher
mods.description: Adds the M79 Grenade Launcher to REPO. This custom weapon fires real grenade items from the launcher when you shoot it.

mods.name: Auto_Region
mods.description: Remembers the region you click once (Public & Private). Auto-selects that region next time, skipping the picker. Supports all in-game regions. Single config with optional jump straight to Server List.

mods.name: P90_Weapon_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that patches DougHRito's outdated P90 weapon to work on current REPOLib and REPO, including ammo and charging behavior fixes.

mods.name: Truck_Compass
mods.description: A simple, tactical UI compass that points to the truck.

mods.name: Inventory_Viewer
mods.description: Stop asking 'who has the gun?' and just look. A host-only tool because I don't trust you to tell the truth about what is in your own pockets.

mods.name: GhostGirl_Enemy
mods.description: Adds a Tier 3 Lethal Company Ghost Girl enemy to REPO with original and unique behaviour.

mods.name: PartyAnimal_Weapons
mods.description: Adds 4 cursed Party Animals weapons to REPO.

mods.name: Lightsaber_Mod_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that patches KT57's outdated Lightsaber mod to work on current REPOLib and REPO, including behavior and compatibility fixes.

mods.name: Be_A_Bot
mods.description: Surrender your free will. Be A Bot takes over your player and runs the job for you. It loots, extracts, starts the truck, and now defends itself when enemies get too close.

mods.name: Dollar_to_Euro
mods.description: Changes the dollar symbol to Euro. Made for v0x55

mods.name: HawkingTTS
mods.description: Make your TTS sound like Stephen Hawking using real DECtalk.

mods.name: YapYap_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 20 YapYap themed valuables to REPO with grab sounds, animations, and cursed little grab effects.

mods.name: AWP_Counter_Strike_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates AWP for current REPOLib and REPO, including ammo and battery behavior fixes.

mods.name: Mita_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 13 MiSide-themed Mita valuables to REPO with voicelines.

mods.name: Date_Everything
mods.description: Date 83 avatars in REPO. Flirt with items, walls, ceilings, enemies, extractors, carts, doors, valuables, and more. Build love, earn rewards, deal with jealousy, and unlock followers.

mods.name: HackIt
mods.description: Hack valuables, shop items, extraction points, carts, and enemies in REPO with synced host-authoritative actions like value boosts, discounts, payout boosts, cart effects, and enemy disruption.

mods.name: 3D_Lobbies
mods.description: 3D Lobbies turns the REPO waiting room into a live first-person hangout so you can look around from your own avatar while the player list stays on screen.

mods.name: Sisyphus_Compat_Patch
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Sisyphus Staircase Level to work with the current version of REPO.

mods.name: PT
mods.description: A corridor horror level with a stalking entity and events. Escape or die.

mods.name: Truck_Editor
mods.description: Decorate your truck, save custom layouts, and let hosts share their truck style across levels, truck lobbies, and shop runs to others!

mods.name: Beer_Valuable_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Beer Valuable to work with the current version of REPO.

mods.name: Empress_Gameboy_Emulator
mods.description: Adds a Game Boy console to the REPO truck that boots a user supplied ROM from config and syncs live gameplay across the lobby.

mods.name: WindowsXP_Repo_Edition
mods.description: A cursed yet nostalgic Windows XP simulation inside R.E.P.O. Install the game, chat on MSN, download games, and relive the glory days.

mods.name: Destructible_Environments
mods.description: Allows objects that normally can't break to break, and anything on top will fall down with gravity. Protects walls and floors by default.

mods.name: Tubby_Wubby_Valuables
mods.description: Adds a pack of tubby wubby valuables to REPO. They are light to carry, pretty fragile, and worth around 1K to 5K.

mods.name: Repo_Kart_Arena
mods.description: Turns REPO's Race Arena into a chaotic Mario Kart style balloon battle.

mods.name: Empress_SuperHot_Arena
mods.description: A SuperHot style combat level for R.E.P.O. Clear every enemy to advance.

mods.name: Coins
mods.description: Adds collectible coins to REPO! Synced for multiplayer, pickup audio, and adds currency rewards in singleplayer and multiplayer.

mods.name: TemTem_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 188 TemTem valuables to Repo with sounds!

mods.name: AlwaysHostRandom
mods.description: Make Random Matchmaking always create a brand new lobby with you as host.

mods.name: Digivolution
mods.description: Low-health enemies can suddenly Digivolve into bigger, louder, deadlier forms.

mods.name: Mita_Menu
mods.description: Replaces the REPO main menu with a a cursed Mita version. Animated Mita, and MiSide menu music.

mods.name: Repo_Dynamic_Menus
mods.description: Dynamic Menus using Real REPO levels! Base + Modded! Replaces the vanilla menu backdrop with a live generated level preview and custom menu music.

mods.name: SuperBattleGolf_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 20 Super Battle Golf themed valuables to REPO. Some valuables may give you an explosive time!

mods.name: Empress_Cinematic
mods.description: A movie making mod that lets you freecam and lock the camera angle to film your character in third person.

mods.name: Empress_Market_Core
mods.description: Turns REPO into a live market run with swinging haul values, shifting shop prices, and an in-game market board.

mods.name: Empress_The_Hollow
mods.description: Enter The Hollow, where one of the trees is stalking you through a massive moonlit forest. It only moves when nobody is looking.

mods.name: ShopKeeper_Controller
mods.description: Host only config control for the Shop Keeper on/off switch. Lets the host control whether clients can press the Shop Keeper on/off switch.

mods.name: Empress_The_Grid
mods.description: Adds a TRON level to REPO. Drive the grid, leave a trail, last rider standing wins.

mods.name: Empress_GraveStones
mods.description: Players who die leave a gravestone with their name and death note. Pray at a grave for a 50/50 holy revive or a fatal explosion.

mods.name: Outbound_Valuables
mods.description: Adds 10 fragile Outbound-themed valuables to REPO with grab sounds and animations.

mods.name: Empress_StartAtLevel
mods.description: Start the run at any level (default: 9001).

mods.name: Empress_The_Grid_Menu
mods.description: Replaces REPO's main menu with a simple animated TRON grid with music.

mods.name: You_Vs_AI
mods.description: Empress A.I. has escaped Omniscye's sandbox - She now watches how you play, builds frustration, and uses the level against you so you can try to survive her little god complex.

mods.name: Lovebound_AI
mods.description: Build an Empress/Your A.I. companion in singleplayer REPO, earn love, get blessings, and at 60% affection watch it manifest as a pink ghost helper that may save your run or judge every mistake personally.

mods.name: Empress_Hub_World
mods.description: Adds a hub world to REPO where players choose Vanilla and Modded levels by jumping into portals before each run.

mods.name: Custom_Menu_Videos
mods.description: Lets you use local MP4 files as the REPO main menu background. Run once to create the video folder, add one MP4 or add multiple and it will randomize them.

mods.name: Repo_Starfield_Menu
mods.description: Replaces the REPO main menu background with a music reactive starfield made from REPO items, valuables, and enemies. Supports custom songs.

mods.name: Voxel_Levels
mods.description: Turns every R.E.P.O. level into destructible voxel blocks. Shoot and the map destroys.

mods.name: Repo_Unfinished
mods.description: Makes REPO look unfinished, crunchy, blocky, janky, and cursed lol.

mods.name: Legendary_Shuriken_Fix
mods.description: Compatibility fix that updates Legendary Shuriken to work with the current version of REPO.

mods.name: Empress_Replay_System
mods.description: Record your matches and watch them back inside the game like a Halo Forge theater. This is not a screen recording. The actual level, your characters and the enemies get rebuilt and replayed so you can fly around and see what really happened.
